description_text: Product Description Item Description • This listing is for 4 pieces (2 L & 2 R) 100% Brand New & High Quality Front Bumper Canards Splitters. • Made of high quality ABS plastic with UV-Resistant epoxy coating for a long-lasting result. • Give your vehicle a nice aggressive and affordable sporty look by adding this front bumper canard. • Come with self-adhesive tape for easy, simple installation. Technical parameter • Conditions: New • Quantity: 4 pieces (2 L and 2 R) • Color: Carbon fiber • Material: ABS & Carbon fiber Pattern • Fitment: Universal fit most of cars • Size: As the pictures shown Installation • Simply clean the bumper and remove any dirt or leftover water. • Peel off the double-sided tape, and stick on the bumper. • Allow the tape to adhere onto the surface and use the screws to permanently secure the bumper. • Professional installation is highly recommended Shipping Service About us Contact us Shipped from China to Australia Service Delivery Tracked Shipping SpeedPAK Economy 19 to 40 bussiness days （1-2 months） No SpeedPAK Standard 8 to 12 bussiness days (1-3 weeks) Yes powered by
